summary: Tested hierarchical Plano de Contas feature with dependent dropdowns in Contas a Pagar and Contas a Receber. The main functionality is WORKING - dropdowns correctly show only level 1 accounts and filter subcontas based on selected parent. Found 1 bug in PlanoContasPage and 1 UI issue in ContasReceberPage.

ui_bugs.issue: When clicking 'Adicionar Subconta' (+) button on the second account in the list, the subconta is created under the first account instead of the clicked account. The pai_id is not being correctly passed when there are multiple accounts.
Duplicate 'Observações' field in the form - there are two Observações labels/inputs (lines 437 and 439)

passed_tests: Navigate to Admin > Plano de Contas - SUCCESS
Create Level 1 Despesa account (1.0 - TEST_Despesas Operacionais) - SUCCESS
Create Subconta (1.1 - TEST_Aluguel e Manutenção) linked to Despesa - SUCCESS
Create Level 1 Receita account (2.0 - TEST_Receitas de Serviços) - SUCCESS
Contas a Pagar: Plano de Contas dropdown shows only Level 1 Despesa accounts - SUCCESS
Contas a Pagar: Subconta dropdown is disabled when no Plano de Contas selected - SUCCESS
Contas a Pagar: Subconta dropdown is enabled and populated after selecting Plano de Contas - SUCCESS
Contas a Pagar: Subconta dropdown shows filtered subcontas (1.1 - TEST_Aluguel e Manutenção) - SUCCESS
Contas a Receber: Plano de Contas dropdown shows only Level 1 Receita accounts - SUCCESS
Contas a Receber: Subconta dropdown is disabled when no Plano de Contas selected - SUCCESS
Contas a Receber: Both hierarchical dropdowns (Plano de Contas + Subconta) are present in the form - SUCCESS
failed_tests: Create Subconta for Receita account - FAILED (subconta was created under Despesa account instead)
action_items: FIX PlanoContasPage.jsx: The 'Adicionar Subconta' button click handler is not correctly identifying which parent account was clicked. When there are multiple accounts, clicking + on the second account creates subconta under the first account.
FIX ContasReceberPage.jsx: Remove duplicate 'Observações' field (line 439 duplicates line 437)
critical_code_review_comments: PlanoContasPage.jsx line 202-204: The openModal function receives paiId parameter but the button click may not be passing the correct account ID when multiple accounts exist
ContasReceberPage.jsx line 439: Duplicate Observações input field - should be removed
seed_data_creation: Created test data in Plano de Contas: 1.0 - TEST_Despesas Operacionais (despesa, level 1), 1.1 - TEST_Aluguel e Manutenção (despesa, level 2), 2.0 - TEST_Receitas de Serviços (receita, level 1), 2.1 - TEST_Serviços de Manutenção (despesa, level 2 - incorrectly linked due to bug)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hierarchical Plano de Contas feature tested. The dependent dropdowns in Contas a Pagar and Contas a Receber are working correctly - they show only level 1 accounts and filter subcontas by pai_id. Found bug in PlanoContasPage where clicking + button on second account creates subconta under first account. Test data created: TEST_Despesas Operacionais, TEST_Aluguel e Manutenção, TEST_Receitas de Serviços.

plano_contas_hierarchical.level_2_creation: BUG - wrong parent assignment when multiple accounts exist

contas_receber_dropdowns.subconta_dropdown: Present and functional (no subcontas to test due to bug)

rca_of_the_issue: The PlanoContasPage.jsx uses button[title='Adicionar Subconta'] buttons for each level 1 account. When clicking the + button, the openModal function should receive the correct paiId. However, when there are multiple accounts rendered, the click event may be capturing the wrong account's ID. This could be due to closure issues in the renderConta function or incorrect event binding.
